quote: I've tried fancy pickles from all over. Nothing comes close. The crunch is real, the heat sneaks up on you, and the jar was gone in two days.
author: Mike R.

quote: Bought the Cowboy Candy at a market thinking it'd last a week. Mixed it into cream cheese that night and it was gone by Sunday. Already ordered more.
author: Sarah T.

quote: I grabbed the garlic on a whim at a farmers market. Ate half the jar in the parking lot. Now I drive across town to find Jesse and stock up.
author: Carlos M.

quote: You can taste the difference between this and store-bought anything. Jesse puts real love into these jars, and it shows in every bite.
author: Denver Dave

quote: The Shoyu Garlic is unreal. I put it in ramen, on rice bowls, straight out of the jar — it's umami in a way I've never tasted from a brined product.
author: Kim L.
